target: Percolation Threshold Theory x T Cell Infiltration in Solid Tumors

LOX inhibitor enhances T cell infiltration and immunotherapy

checks.name: KEGG LOX pathway cross-check
checks.note: API returned empty results on two attempts; LOX acts upstream of KEGG ECM pathways

checks.name: Physics: p_c vs LOX crosslink density
checks.note: p_c = 0.25 fully accessible; LOX spans entire range

checks.name: Physics: T cell vs collagen pore size
checks.note: Biological density range spans percolation transition

checks.name: Physics: correlation length measurability
checks.note: All values within confocal/MPM/SHG/histology imaging range

checks.name: Physics: active vs passive (Peclet number)
checks.note: Pe ~ 3 >> 1 means active-particle corrections are mandatory; p_c(active) ~ 0.21-0.24
checks.implication: Active percolation frame required; this is a feature strengthening novelty

checks.name: Physics: MSD anomalous diffusion at percolation
checks.note: Subdiffusion (alpha=0.53) measurable by single-cell tracking in tumor explants

key_concerns: Active particle correction to p_c is mandatory (Pe ~ 3) — generator must not use passive p_c = 0.2488 without flagging
KEGG unavailable — relies on 2024-2025 literature not yet in curated databases
Ashworth 2015 prior art: generator must scope novelty to tumor immunology / T cells / LOX mechanism
